title: The Byte Trap
tagline: Change one byte of the code and the API refuses to run — in the doubter's own browser.
holy_shit: A stranger changes one character of the code your API runs, and the API refuses to run it — no server, no antivirus, no login, just SHA-256 in their own browser.
powered_by: /track + /fn verify-before-exec: fetch the pinned cell, recompute SHA-256 in the browser, refuse on any mismatch, import the exact verified bytes, run them
agent_scenario: When you need to run code fetched from an untrusted host and prove byte-for-byte it wasn't altered before it executes.
author: kody-w + Claude
